claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

naming.iconOnlyPolicy: An inspectably unnamed icon-only button emits an actionable development diagnostic.
naming.guardLimit: Custom child components, non-hidden SVG descendants, and title fallbacks whose browser accessibility output cannot be established from source are not claimed as named or unnamed.
naming.pendingPolicy: pendingLabel replaces the visible label when supplied; it also becomes the direct name when aria-label was used, and temporarily replaces aria-labelledby so visible label-in-name is preserved. Otherwise the original visible label and name source remain.

keyboard.behavior: Native button activation; pending cancels the synthesized click before onClick.
Native button activation; pending cancels the synthesized click before onClick.

interaction.pointer: Native click activation completes on release; pending cancels click default and propagation.
interaction.touch: Coarse-pointer styling raises the minimum target to 44 CSS pixels.
interaction.speech: Visible label remains part of the accessible name; icon-only usage requires an explicit name.
interaction.switch: The native button remains a single sequential focus target.

disabled.behavior: Uses native disabled focus and activation behavior.

pending.behavior: Remains focusable, prevents activation, and displays pendingLabel or the original label.

preferences.forcedColors: Uses system colors, a visible border, and a system-color focus outline.
preferences.reducedMotion: Stops the pending rotation while retaining shape, label, and aria-busy cues.

responsive.intrinsic: Content wraps and block size grows without clipping text.

consumerResponsibilities: Supply a meaningful accessible name in every state.
Localize visible labels, aria-label, aria-labelledby targets, and pendingLabel.
Use type=submit only when native form submission is intended.
Do not combine pending with disabled when pending focus retention is required.
Revalidate contrast and focus visibility after overriding semantic tokens or component CSS.
